igbo.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Laghachi na ndepụta ngwaọrụ STEM Lab
igbo.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke aka m
igbo.interval_singer: Onye Ọ Bụ Abụ Oghere Olu
igbo.how_sharp_or_flat_you_are_aim_for_the_: Ka i si dị elu ma ọ bụ ala. Chee ihu na mpaghara akwụkwọ ndụ akwụkwọ ndụ etiti (±10 cents).
igbo.your_pitch_over_time_mapped_to_musical: Ọdịda olu gị n'oge, e depụtara ya na ụda egwu. Akwụkwọ ndụ = ziri ezi, edo edo = nso, uhie = olu ezughị ezu.
igbo.piano_roll_showing_pitch_history_green: Piano roll na-egosi akụkọ ọdịda olu. Ahịrị akwụkwọ ndụ na-egosi ịbụ abụ ziri ezi (n'ime 10 cents), edo edo nso (n'ime 25 cents), uhie olu ezughị ezu (karịrị 25 cents).
igbo.click_a_note_to_hear_the_tone_try_to_m: Pịa otu ndetu ka ị nụ ụda ahụ. Gbalịa ijikọ ya na olu gị!
igbo.a_tone_plays_match_it_with_your_voice_: Otu ụda na-akpọ — jikọọ ya na olu gị! Jide ọdịda olu ziri ezi otu sekọnd. Akara dabere na ọsọ.
igbo.sing_this_note_and_hold_it_within_10_c: Bụọ ndetu a ma jide ya n'ime 10 cents otu sekọnd
igbo.this_will_guide_you_through_finding_yo: Nke a ga-eduzi gị ịchọta ndetu gị kacha ala na kacha elu nke dị mma. Jide n'aka na maikrofon na-arụ ọrụ.
igbo.sing_your_lowest_comfortable_note: Bụọ ndetu gị kacha ala nke dị mma
igbo.hold_the_note_steady_for_about_1_secon: Jide ndetu ahụ kwụsie ike ihe dịka otu sekọnd.
igbo.cancel_vocal_range_test_low_range: Kagbuo ule ókè olu (ókè dị ala)
igbo.now_sing_your_highest_comfortable_note: Ugbu a bụọ ndetu gị kacha elu nke dị mma
igbo.cancel_vocal_range_test_high_range: Kagbuo ule ókè olu (ókè dị elu)
igbo.estimated_from_your_lowest_note_true_v: E mere atụmatụ site na ndetu gị kacha ala — ụdị olu n'ezie na-adaberekwa na ókè dị mma (tessitura) na agba olu, ọ bụghị naanị na ókè.
igbo.piano_keyboard_showing_vocal_range_use: Ahịrị igodo piano na-egosi ókè olu. Jiri igodo àkụ aka ekpe/aka nri gafere ndetu, Enter ma ọ bụ Space igwu.
igbo.start_singing_a_sustained_note: Malite ịbụ ndetu edobere ogologo oge.
igbo.very_little_pitch_variation_good_for_c: Obere mgbanwe ọdịda olu nke ukwuu. Dị mma maka ngwakọta ndị ọ bụ abụ!
igbo.vibrato_rate_is_above_8_hz_try_to_rela: Ọnụego vibrato dị elu karịa 8 Hz. Gbalịa izu ike ma belata ọsọ.
igbo.vibrato_rate_is_below_4_hz_try_to_ener: Ọnụego vibrato dị ala karịa 4 Hz. Gbalịa inye ike na mgbaba ikuku gị.
igbo.vibrato_width_exceeds_100_cents_try_fo: Obosara vibrato karịrị 100 cents. Chee ihu na mkpọtụ dị warara.
igbo.beautiful_rate_and_depth_are_in_the_id: Mara mma! Ọnụego na omimi dị n'ókè kacha mma.
igbo.getting_there_aim_for_5_7_hz_rate_and_: Ọ fọrọ nke nta! Chee ihu na ọnụego 5-7 Hz na omimi 30-80 cents.
igbo.sustain_a_note_with_no_vibrato_practic: Jide otu ndetu na-enweghị vibrato. Zụọ njikwa olu gị ka ọ kwụsie ike kpamkpam.
igbo.sustain_a_note_and_let_your_natural_vi: Jide otu ndetu ma hapụ vibrato gị nke okike ka ọ pụta. Amanyela ya — zuru ike ka o mee.
igbo.try_to_vibrate_at_exactly_6_hz_6_oscil: Gbalịa ịma jijiji na kpọmkwem 6 Hz (mkpọtụ 6 kwa sekọnd). Lelee ọgụgụ ọnụego.
igbo.try_to_keep_vibrato_depth_around_50_ce: Gbalịa idobe omimi vibrato ihe dịka 50 cents. Ọ bụghị obosara nke ukwuu, ọ bụghị warara nke ukwuu.
igbo.sustain_a_note_to_see_your_vibrato_pat: Jide otu ndetu ka ị hụ usoro vibrato gị. Ahịrị etiti bụ ọdịda olu nkezi gị.
igbo.vibrato_waveform_trace_showing_pitch_d: Akara ọdịdị ebili mmiri vibrato na-egosi ndakọ ọdịda olu n'oge
igbo.staff_notation_showing_reference_targe: Ederede ahịrị egwu na-egosi ntụaka, ebumnuche, na ndetu gị dị ugbu a
igbo.explore_how_your_body_makes_sound_clic: Nyochaa otú ahụ gị si eme ụda. Pịa mpaghara ka ị mụta gbasara ya, ma ọ bụ gbaa animeshọn ka ị hụ ka ọ na-arụ ọrụ.
igbo.sagittal_cross_section_diagram_of_the_: Eserese nkewa sagittal nke ụzọ olu mmadụ. Jiri igodo àkụ aka ekpe/aka nri gaa n'etiti mpaghara, Enter ma ọ bụ Space ịhọrọ.
igbo.high_pitch_fast_vibration: Ọdịda olu dị elu (mkpọtụ ọsọ ọsọ)
igbo.understanding_these_conditions_helps_y: Ịghọta ọnọdụ ndị a na-enyere gị aka ịmata akara ịdọ aka ná ntị n'oge. Ọ bụrụ na ị nwere mgbaàmà na-aga n'ihu, gaa hụ dọkịta.
igbo.this_information_is_educational_only_i: 👨‍⚕️ Ozi a bụ naanị maka agụmakwụkwọ. Ọ bụghị ndụmọdụ ahụike. Ọ bụrụ na ị nwere nchegbu gbasara olu gị, gaa hụ dọkịta ntị-imi-akpịrị ma ọ bụ ọkachamara okwu.
igbo.get_personalized_vocal_health_tips_app: Nweta ndụmọdụ ahụike olu ahaziri onwe gị nke dabara na ọkwa klas gị.
igbo.breathe_deep_into_your_belly_diaphragm: Kubata ume miri emi n'ime afọ gị (diaphragm), ọ bụghị n'ime obi.
igbo.keep_your_core_engaged_to_control_airf: Debe akwara etiti gị na-arụ ọrụ iji jikwaa mgbaba ikuku mgbe ị na-abụ abụ.
igbo.let_the_air_flow_smoothly_and_evenly_t: Hapụ ikuku ka ọ na-asọ nke ọma ma na-aha nhaụ site n'akwara olu gị.
igbo.feet_shoulder_width_apart_weight_balan: Ụkwụ n'obosara ubu, ibu haziri nhaụ
igbo.shoulders_relaxed_and_rolled_back_not_: Ubu zuru ike ma tụgharịa azụ (ọ bụghị ngbịpọ)
igbo.chin_level_not_tilted_up_or_down: Agba nʼotu ọkwa — ọ dịghị eleghara elu ma ọ bụ ala
igbo.jaw_relaxed_and_slightly_dropped_when_: Agba zuru ike ma daa ntakịrị mgbe ị na-abụ abụ
igbo.avoid_locking_knees_tensing_neck_or_cl: Zere: ịkpọchi ikpere, ịdọ olu, ma ọ bụ ịtachi agba
igbo.read_the_notes_on_the_staff_and_sing_t: Gụọ ndetu na ahịrị egwu ma bụọ ha n'usoro. Nchọpụta ọdịda olu nke oge dabara na-enyocha izi ezi gị.
igbo.correct_1st_try: Ziri ezi na nnwale nke mbụ
igbo.singing_and_vocal_lab: Ụlọ Nyocha Ịbụ Abụ na Olu
igbo.pitch_training_vocal_range_vibrato_int: Ọzụzụ ọdịda olu, ókè olu, vibrato, na ịbụ abụ oghere olu
igbo.sing_into_the_mic_the_lab_tracks_frequ: Bụọ abụ n'ime maikrofon; ụlọ nyocha na-eso ugboro n'oge dabara. Ndị ọ bụ abụ a zụrụ azụ na-edobe ọdịda olu n'ime ±5 cents (1/20 nke ọkara ụda) — otú a ka ọdịda olu zuru oke si ada.
igbo.most_untrained_voices_span_1_5_2_octav: Ọtụtụ olu a na-azụghị azụ na-agbasa octave 1.5-2; ndị ọ bụ abụ oge gboo a zụrụ azụ na-eru 3 ma ọ bụ karịa. Ịgbasa ókè bụ karịa gbasara ịgwakọta rejista, ọ bụghị naanị ịdọ elu na ala.
igbo.healthy_vibrato_5_7_hz_oscillation_60_: Vibrato ahụ ike: mkpọtụ 5-7 Hz, nke nwere obosara ~60-100 cents. Nwayọọ karịa = mkpọka; ọsọ karịa = ịma jijiji. Vibrato bụ ọrụ nke nkwado iku ume zuru ike, ọ bụghị usoro dị iche.
igbo.interval_singer_ear_training: Onye Ọ Bụ Abụ Oghere Olu — Ọzụzụ Ntị
igbo.major_3rd_vs_minor_3rd_is_the_single_m: Nke atọ ukwu megide nke atọ nta bụ ụzọ oghere olu kacha na-agbagwoju anya maka ndị mbido. Akara ncheta: nke atọ ukwu = "Oh when the saints", nke atọ nta = "Greensleeves". Na-ewu nnụ olu metụtara.
igbo.lip_trills_sirens_before_any_sustained: Ịma jijiji egbugbere ọnụ + ụda mkpu tupu ịbụ abụ ọ bụla dị ogologo. Nkeji 5-10 nke ikpo ọkụ obere ike na-ebelata ihe ize ndụ nke iji akwara olu eme ihe karịa site n'ọkara. Ịwụfe ikpo ọkụ bụ ihe kpatara nke mbụ nke mmerụ olu enwere ike igbochi.
igbo.solf_ge_do_re_mi_letter_names_for_sigh: Solfège (do-re-mi) ka mma karịa aha mkpụrụedemede maka ịgụ akara n'ihi na nkeji okwu na-edepụta mmekọrịta oghere olu, ọ bụghị naanị akara ọdịda olu. Do na-agagharị ka mma karịa do kwụsiri ike maka egwu ụda.
igbo.resonance_lab_discover_your_vocal_tone: Ụlọ Nyocha Ụda Mkpughe — Chọpụta Agba Olu Gị
igbo.two_sliders_throat_openness_and_soft_p: Ihe mmịfe abụọ — imeghe akpịrị na ibuli elu ọnụ dị nro — na-ejikọta n' àgwà agba olu anọ (bara ụba, na-egbuke egbuke, na-ekpo ọkụ, imi). Enweghị akara, enweghị nkpughe: nwalee, dee, ma kọwaa ihe ị chọpụtara.
igbo.operatic_professional_tone_full_resona: Agba olu opera / ọkachamara. Ụda mkpughe zuru oke.
igbo.mellow_tone_choral_acoustic: Agba olu dị nro. Ndị ọ bụ abụ / akụstik.
igbo.tight_resonance_often_unintended: Ụda mkpughe siri ike. Ọtụtụ mgbe na-abụghị ebumnuche.
igbo.sliders_for_throat_openness_soft_palat: Ihe mmịfe maka imeghe akpịrị, ibuli elu ọnụ dị nro. Nhazi dị iche na agba olu 4. Enweghị akara, enweghị nkpughe.
igbo.hypothesis_what_anatomical_adjustments: Echiche: Kedu mgbanwe nkọwa ahụ na-emepụta agba olu bara ụba?
igbo.why_do_classical_singers_lift_the_pala: Gịnị mere ndị ọ bụ abụ oge gboo ji ebuli elu ọnụ?
igbo.how_does_throat_openness_affect_overto: Kedu ka imeghe akpịrị si emetụta usoro ụda dị elu?
igbo.explain_how_resonance_cavity_shape_con: Kọwaa otú ọdịdị oghere ụda mkpughe si achịkwa agba olu.
igbo.design_note_discrete_4_tone_marker_no_: Ihe edeturu imewe: akara agba olu 4 dị iche; enweghị akara akụstik; enweghị nkpughe — na ebumnuche.
